contract_summary: This is a set-wrapper that creates a new bfq_group with an initial reference count of 1 (via refcount_set). The caller obtains ownership of the embedded blkg_policy_data and must later release the reference with a corresponding put operation (e.g., bfqg_put or bfqg_and_blkg_put) when the object is no longer needed. If allocation or stats initialization fails, NULL is returned and no reference is taken. The function establishes the object's lifecycle start.
